entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Tanungin mo muna ako bago magpaliwanag nang sobra."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Suriin muna ang sagot ko bago ibigay ang sa iyo."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Bigyan mo ako ng mas mahirap na bersyon pagkatapos kong subukan."

entries.source: "Help me outline a story"
entries.value: "Tulungan mo akong gumawa ng balangkas isang kuwento"

entries.source: "Improve my essay introduction"
entries.value: "Pahusayin ang aking sanaysay introduction"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Panatilihin itong beginner-friendly."

entries.source: "Make this paragraph clearer"
entries.value: "Gawing mas malinaw ang talatang ito"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Gumamit ng mga halimbawa mula sa exam, proyekto, o araw-araw kong buhay."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI mga prompt

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang tiny una gawain.

entries.source: Communication
entries.value: Komunikasyon

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End kasama ang isang recap ikaw magsulat yourself.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Pahusayin ang pagsusulat kasama ang pagpaplano, revision, structure, at feedback na keeps iyong voice intact.

entries.source: For Writing Coach, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Para sa Pagsusulat Coach, isang kapaki-pakinabang loop ng pagsasanay ay:

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Mahusay mga prompt karaniwan isama tatlo things: ang paksa, iyong kasalukuyan antas, at ang kind ng tulong ikaw gusto. Ikaw gawin hindi kailangan perfect wording. Ikaw lamang kailangan enough konteksto para sa ang session sa magsimula.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Kung ang response feels too broad, narrow ito. Humingi ng isa halimbawa, isa maling akala, isa suriin tanong, o isa susunod hakbang. Kung ito feels too madali, Humingi ng isang challenge. Kung ito feels too mahirap, Humingi ng isang bridge mula sa ano ikaw na alam.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Gumawa ng ang output mas marami kapaki-pakinabang

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt mga ideya at isang nauulit loop sa pag-aaral para sa getting kapaki-pakinabang pag-aaral mga resulta mula sa Pagsusulat Coach sa inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Pagbabasa isang AI response ay hindi ang same bilang pag-aaral. Pagkatapos ang una sagot, magtanong ang mode gumawa ikaw gawin something kasama ang ideya.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Kaugnay mga landas sa pag-aaral

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request feedback sa ang part na felt hindi tiyak.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond bago pagtatanong para sa ang solusyon.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang isa malinaw request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Estado ang layunin sa isa sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: study skills sa pag-aaral

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Na huli recap ay important. Kapag ikaw Ipaliwanag ang ideya likod, ikaw reveal Ano ang solid at Ano ang pa rin borrowed mula sa ang AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: Ang pinakamahusay mga session sa pag-aaral ay adjustable. Ang coach gives targeted revision priorities at before-after mga halimbawa nang walang replacing iyong voice.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Writing Coach is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Ang pinakamabilis na paraan para makakuha ng halaga mula sa Writing Coach ay bigyan ang AI ng gawain sa pag-aaral, hindi lang paksa. Sinasabi ng paksa kung ano ang interesado ka. Sinasabi ng gawain sa pag-aaral kung anong uri ng tulong ang kailangan mo.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Pagkatapos add isang constraint na gumagawa ang session mas marami personal:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Subukan isa ng mga ito starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Gawing ang mode inmagsanay

entries.source: Use Writing Coach when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Science Lab Partner. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Gamitin Pagsusulat Coach kapag ito ay ang tama mode para sa ang gawain. Kung ikaw gusto isang kaugnay landas, subukan Science Lab Partner. Ikaw Maaari bang also Tingnan ang AI pag-aaral blog para sa study mga paraan, Socratic pag-aaral, mga flashcard, roleplay, at aktibong pag-alala.

entries.source: Writing Coach prompts and study loop
entries.value: Pagsusulat Coach mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral
